name: PrimeNG
description: Enterprise Angular UI Component Library with 80+ components, multiple design themes, and professional support from PrimeTek

description.value: Enterprise Angular UI Component Library with 80+ components, multiple design themes, and professional support from PrimeTek

active-maintenance.comment: Very active; v21.0.2 released December 15, 2025; 21,641 commits; 98.4% TypeScript codebase

initial-release.comment: Repository created January 16, 2016; aligned with Angular 2 release

framework.comment: Built specifically for Angular; part of PrimeTek's multi-framework suite (PrimeVue, PrimeReact, PrimeFaces)

styling-approach.comment: Three-tier design token system (primitive, semantic, component tokens); CSS variables with configurable prefix; unstyled mode for Tailwind integration

component-model.comment: Offers styled mode with pre-built themes (Aura, Material, Lara, Nora) and headless mode for complete UI customization

typescript.comment: 98.4% TypeScript codebase; full type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Compatible with Angular SSR (formerly Angular Universal); all components support SSR when properly configured

rsc-compatible.comment: N/A - React Server Components is a React-specific feature; not applicable to Angular

design-system.comment: Design-agnostic architecture with 4 built-in presets: Aura (PrimeTek original), Material (Material Design v2), Lara (Bootstrap-inspired), Nora (Enterprise)

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode with multiple implementation options: system preference, custom class selector, or disabled; colorScheme tokens for light/dark values

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via definePreset() utility; dynamic theme switching with usePreset() and updatePreset(); scoped tokens via dt property

css-variables.comment: Extensive CSS custom properties with configurable prefix (default: --p-); supports runtime updates

design-tokens.comment: Three-tier token system: primitive (color palettes), semantic (contextual like primary.color), and component tokens (button.color, inputtext.background)

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via CSS logical properties ensuring automatic layout adjustments without separate theme variants

component-count.comment: 80+ distinct components across form inputs, data display, overlays, menus, charts, and utilities

text-input.comment: InputText component with pInputText directive; keyfiltering, FloatLabel/IftaLabel support, sizes, filled/outlined variants

textarea.comment: Textarea with pTextarea directive; auto-resize capability, FloatLabel support, sizes, variants

select.comment: Select component (replacement for Dropdown); filtering, virtual scrolling, grouped options, templates

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect with chip display, filtering, virtual scrolling, grouped options, loading state

combobox.comment: AutoComplete with real-time suggestions; single/multiple selection, force selection, virtual scrolling, dropdown toggle

checkbox.comment: Checkbox with binary/grouped modes, indeterminate state, filled/outlined variants, sizes

radio.comment: RadioButton with theming, grouping, filled variant, sizes, disabled/invalid states

switch-toggle.comment: ToggleSwitch for boolean selection; custom handle templates, form integration, accessibility via hidden native checkbox

slider.comment: Slider with single/dual-thumb (range mode), step increments, vertical orientation, form integration

number-input.comment: InputNumber with integer/decimal modes, locale support, currency formatting, spinner buttons, min/max boundaries

tag-input.comment: AutoComplete in multiple selection mode provides tag/chip input functionality with add on blur/tab/separator

pin-input.comment: InputOtp for OTP/PIN input; configurable length, masking, integer-only mode, custom templates

color-picker.comment: ColorPicker with popup/inline display, hex/rgb/hsb formats, form integration

date-picker.comment: DatePicker (renamed from Calendar) with multiple selection modes, custom formats, min/max dates, month/year views

time-picker.comment: DatePicker with showTime prop; 12/24 hour format, timeOnly mode for time-only selection

date-range-picker.comment: DatePicker supports range selection via selectionMode='range'; multiple months display

file-upload.comment: FileUpload with basic/advanced modes, multi-file support, auto upload, progress tracking, validations

dropzone.comment: FileUpload advanced mode includes drag-and-drop support with customizable templates

rating-input.comment: Rating component with customizable star count, read-only mode, custom icon templates

input-groups.comment: InputGroup for combining inputs with addons (icons, buttons, text); FloatLabel/IftaLabel compatible

input-with-dropdown.comment: Supported via InputGroup composition with Select or Button addons

button-groups.comment: Button groups and SelectButton components for segmented controls

split-button.comment: SplitButton with primary action and dropdown for secondary actions; severity levels, variants, sizes

table.comment: Table component provides basic data table functionality

data-table.comment: Advanced Table with sorting, filtering, pagination, virtual scrolling (10K+ records), selection, inline editing, column resizing, frozen rows/columns, CSV export, state persistence

virtual-infinite-list.comment: VirtualScroller for large datasets; vertical/horizontal/grid modes, lazy loading, programmatic scrolling

tree-view.comment: Tree with single/multiple/checkbox selection, drag-and-drop, lazy loading, virtual scrolling, filtering, context menu

list-view.comment: Listbox for selection; OrderList with drag-drop reordering; DataView for styled list display

card.comment: Card with header, title, subtitle, footer templates; flexible container component

avatar.comment: Avatar with label/icon/image modes, sizes, shapes; AvatarGroup for grouping with overflow handling

badge.comment: Badge with severity levels, sizes; OverlayBadge for positioning on any element

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag for categorization with severity, pill style, icons; Chip component also available

timeline.comment: Timeline for sequential events; vertical/horizontal layout, left/right/alternating alignment, custom markers

calendar.comment: DatePicker can display inline as month/week calendar view; multiple month display available

alert.comment: Message component for inline alerts; multiple severities, closable, auto-dismiss via life property

toast-notification.comment: Toast via MessageService; multiple positions, severities, sticky option, custom templates, headless mode

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar with determinate/indeterminate modes, custom content template

progress-circle.comment: Knob component can display circular progress in read-only mode; ProgressSpinner for indeterminate circular loading

spinner-loader.comment: ProgressSpinner with customizable stroke width, animation duration, colors

skeleton.comment: Skeleton with multiple shapes (rectangle, rounded, square, circle), flexible sizing

empty-state.comment: Empty state templates supported in Table, VirtualScroller, and other data components

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog with modal layer, positioning, maximizable, responsive breakpoints, dragging, resizing, header/footer templates, headless mode

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer with left/right/top/bottom positions, full screen mode, header/content/footer templates, headless mode

popover.comment: Popover for floating content; programmatic control via toggle/show/hide methods

tooltip.comment: Tooltip with multiple positions, event triggers, show/hide delays, custom templates via TemplateRef

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component with standard/popup/grouped modes; TieredMenu for hierarchical menus

context-menu.comment: ContextMenu for right-click menus; target element or global activation, Table integration

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; could be built using Dialog + AutoComplete + custom filtering

tabs.comment: Tabs with TabList, Tab, TabPanels, TabPanel components; scrollable, lazy loading, disabled states, custom templates

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs documentation shows only horizontal layouts; no explicit vertical tabs support documented

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb with router integration, custom item/separator templates

pagination.comment: Paginator with rows per page, page links, jump to page, current page report, templating

stepper.comment: Stepper with horizontal/vertical orientations, linear mode, steps-only view, custom templates

navigation-menu.comment: Menubar for horizontal navigation; MegaMenu, TieredMenu, PanelMenu, SlideMenu also available

sidebar.comment: Drawer component serves as sidebar; PanelMenu for collapsible sidebar navigation patterns

bottom-navigation.comment: Dock component for macOS-style dock navigation; can be positioned at bottom for mobile-style nav

grid.comment: No dedicated Grid layout component; PrimeFlex utility library provides grid classes separately

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component; use PrimeFlex utility classes for flex layouts

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; use PrimeFlex utility classes

divider.comment: Divider with horizontal/vertical layout, solid/dotted/dashed types, content alignment

collapsible.comment: Accordion for multiple collapsible sections; Panel with toggleable content; Fieldset also available

resizable.comment: Splitter for resizable panels; Dialog supports resizable option

splitter.comment: Splitter with horizontal/vertical layout, nested splitters, minSizes constraints

rich-text-editors.comment: Official Editor component based on Quill; requires quill as dependency; customizable toolbar via ng-template

chart-libraries.comment: Chart component built on Chart.js 3.3.2+; supports pie, doughnut, bar, line, radar, polar area charts

form-libraries.comment: Native Angular forms integration (template-driven and reactive forms); no external form library bindings needed

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animation support via Angular animations; Ripple directive for interaction feedback

icon-libraries.comment: PrimeIcons library with 250+ icons included; also available on Figma; components support any icon via templating

date-libraries.comment: DatePicker has built-in date handling with locale support; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; uses semantic HTML with hidden native form elements for accessibility

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support across all interactive components; native form controls used for inherent keyboard accessibility

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader compatible with semantic HTML, proper label associations, .p-sr-only utility class for screen reader-only content

focus-management.comment: Proper focus states and tab order; Popover and Dialog auto-focus first focusable element; focus trapping in modals

wcag-level.comment: Targets WCAG 2.0 AA level compliance; accessibility documentation provided for each component

accessibility-rating.comment: Good accessibility with WCAG AA compliance target, ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, per-component accessibility docs

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle size not reliably measurable; tree-shakeable via individual component imports but components include all feature code

bundle-size-core.comment: Import components individually for optimal bundle size; Table component alone adds ~74kB minified due to embedded features

tree-shakeable.comment: Components imported individually via specific modules (e.g., ButtonModule); unused components excluded from bundle

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Angular lazy loading supported; Tree and VirtualScroller support lazy data loading via onLazyLoad callbacks

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, live examples, accessibility docs per component, theming guides, accessibility info for every component

interactive-docs.comment: Live component examples with StackBlitz integration on documentation site

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; feature requested but not implemented; interactive examples integrated directly in docs

figma-kit.comment: Official PrimeOne Figma UI Kit available (paid); supports Aura light/dark themes, Tokens Studio integration; PrimeIcons on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: No dedicated CLI; uses Angular CLI for project scaffolding; PrimeNG Designer available for theme generation

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~569,000 weekly downloads as of December 2025; PrimeTek libraries total 400M+ downloads across all frameworks

commercial-support.comment: PrimeNG PRO support at $200/hour; 1-business-day response, private issue tracker, 25 hour minimum, 1 year term; consulting partners available

style-override.comment: Override via className, style prop, CSS variables with dt property for scoped tokens, ng-template slots for content customization

compound-components.comment: Pattern used in Accordion (AccordionPanel), Splitter (SplitterPanel), Tabs (Tab/TabPanel), Stepper components

render-props.comment: ng-template with pTemplate directive for customization (body templates, header templates, item templates)

slots.comment: Extensive template/slot system via pTemplate directive; header, footer, item, content templates throughout

unstyled-mode.comment: Headless mode available for complete UI customization; designed for Tailwind and custom CSS integration
